snippet.title: Jab Talak (First Look) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Arijit Singh, Amitabh, Akasa | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
WARNING ⚠️
This summer just got HOTTER🔥

#JabTalak first look out now

#DanceLikeNoOnesWatching #Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎧 Song Credits 

➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Music : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
➟ Singer : Arijit Singh, Akasa
➟ Composer: Pritam Chakraborty
➟ Lyrics : Amitabh Bhattacharya 

Dinesh Vijan & Luv Ranjan presents #Cocktail2​, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026

A Maddock Films & Luv Films Production

🎬 Video Credits

➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor,  Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain & Luv Ranjan
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
➟ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:

MUKHDA 
(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले जब तलक) ×4

है थोड़ा बेसुरा
पर दिल में ताल है
इसको हम नाचने से
टोकें(bindi)  कब तलक

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले जब तलक) ×4

नच्चाँ(bindi)  आज मैं शुकर मना के
सोणे यार तों(bindi)  नज़रें मिला के
मैनू लोड़ किसे दी कोई ना
सारे जग दी लाज भुला के

चल mood बना के सूफ़ी
थोड़ी कर लें(bindi)  बेवकूफ़ी
चूल्हे में जाये मितरा
दुनिया भर की मसरूफ़ी

पैरों को पर लगने से रोकें(bindi)  कब तलक

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले जब तलक) ×4


ANTARA

वे रान्झा आग है जितनी इधर लगी
तू भी मान ले दुगनी उधर लगी

दोनों दिल ही बराबर झुलस गये 
फेर.. जाण दे कितनी किधर लगी
(Not phir but Pher)

अज यार दे करके सदक़े(nukhta)
मैंने प्याले प्याले गटके
चल देखें(bindi)  दिल पटरी से
आख़िर(nukhta)  कब तक ना भटके

देंगे भी दूजे को धोखे कब तलक..

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले तब तलक) ×2

बहकी जवानियाँ जैसे बारूद हैं(bindi)
देखें(bindi)  उठते नहीं हैं(bindi)
शोले कब तलक

(मैं नाचूँ तब तलक
तू बोले तब तलक) ×2

© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd., Under Exclusive License from Mad for Mussic

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

#ZeeMusicCompany #PenMovies

snippet.description:

Lyrical video by 404 studios

Lyrics: 
Pappali Palame 
Thakkali pola 
Pakkava nenja neeyum nasukuriye… 
Mittayi kadaye 
Pattasu nadaye 
Mittava manasula medhakuriye… 
Kalakuriye… ilukuriye… 
Napier-u bridge-ah neeyum minukuriye… 
Usuppuriye… Urukuriye… 
Nethu vecha meen kozhamba manakuriye… 
Hey Latchumi… Latchumi… Latchumi…  
Vandhu touch me… touch me… touch me… 
Nachunu… Nachunu… Nachunu…  
Thaa oru icch-u nee… icch-u nee… icch-u nee…  
Karukallu kavappu 
Annan dhaan da nawab-u 
Bagula thookinnu vandha Eduthuruvaar koluppu… 
Natpukku Madhippu 
Ekkachakkam irukku 
Kannalam katikinna thaana varum poruppu… 
Bodyguard-u junction-u 
Pakkathula Simson-u 
Gana vecha dhaan kala kattum namma function uh… 
Beach-u station-u 
bell-bottom fashion–u 
Kolaaru koduthakka eduthuruvom tuition-u… 
Idhu annanoda jilladi 
Pullaingalaam killadi 
Gana paatu innale Madras-u thaan munnodi… 
Idhu annanoda jilladi 
Pullaingalaam killadi 
Gana paatu innale namma Madras-u thaan munnodi 
Pappali Palame 
Thakkali pola 
Pakkava nenja neeyum nasukuriye… 
Mittayi kadaye 
Pattasu nadaye 
Mittava manasula medhakuriye… 
Kalakuriye… ilukuriye… 
Napier-u bridge-ah neeyum minukuriye… 
Usuppuriye… Urukuriye… 
Nethu vecha meen kozhamba manakuriye… 
Hey Latchumi… Latchumi… Latchumi…  
Vandhu touch me… touch me… touch me… 
Nachunu… Nachunu… Nachunu…  
Thaa oru icch-u nee… icch-u nee… icch-u nee…  
Latchumiiiiiiii…..

snippet.title: Alka Yagnik - Humsafar Ke Liye (Music Video) Sunny Deol, Reema Sen | Alka Yagnik | Jaal: The Trap
snippet.description:
Immerse yourself in the emotional and romantic melody "Humsafar Ke Liye" from the 2003 film Jaal: The Trap. Sung by Alka Yagnik, this soulful track captures the pain and beauty of love, separation, and longing. The music by Anand Raj Anand and heartfelt lyrics make it a touching experience for every romantic heart.

Credits: 
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics:

हमसफर के लिए हमसफर मिल गया
 दिल को रोका मगर दिल गया, दिल गया
 रब तेरा शुक्रिया इस खुशी के लिए
 और क्या चाहिए जिंदगी के लिए
 हमसफर के लिए हमसफर मिल गया
 
 मैंने सोचा ना था प्यार हो जाएगा
 इस तरह से मेरा चैन खो जाएगा
 मैंने सोचा ना था प्यार हो जाएगा
 इस तरह से मेरा चैन खो जाएगा
 तुझ से नज़रें मिली, दिल धड़कने लगा
 तेरी चाहत में पागल तड़पने लगा
 मैंने तुझ को चुना आशिकी के लिए
 रब तेरा शुक्रिया इस खुशी के लिए
 और क्या चाहिए जिंदगी के लिए
 हमसफर के लिए हमसफर मिल गया
 
 मैंने हर सांस पे नाम तेरा लिखा
 धड़कनों पे भी पैगाम तेरा लिखा
 मैंने हर सांस पे नाम तेरा लिखा
 धड़कनों पे भी पैगाम तेरा लिखा
 तेरी बाहों में गुजरी है जो ये घड़ी
 है ये मेरे लिए तो युगों से बड़ी
 इश्क़ मैंने किया जिंदगी के लिए
 रब तेरा शुक्रिया इस खुशी के लिए
 और क्या चाहिए जिंदगी के लिए
 हमसफर के लिए हमसफर मिल गया
 I love you अजय, अजय I love you
 अजय, I love you
 अजय मैं खुशी के मारे पागल हो रही हूँ
 मेरे पांव हवा में पड़ रहे हैं अजय
 मैं उड़ रही हूँ, मुझे गिराने मत देना
 अजय, मत गिराने देना
 मुझे संभाल लेना अजय
 अजय, love you

Music video by Alka Yagnik performing Hamsafar Ke Liye (From "Jaal - The Trap" / Lyric Video).© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd.

 है ये मेरे लिए तो युगों से बड़ी
 इश्क़ मैंने किया जिंदगी के लिए
 रब तेरा शुक्रिया इस खुशी के लिए
 और क्या चाहिए जिंदगी के लिए
 हमसफर के लिए हमसफर मिल गया
 I love you अजय, अजय I love you
 अजय, I love you
 अजय मैं खुशी के मारे पागल हो रही हूँ
 मेरे पांव हवा में पड़ रहे हैं अजय
 मैं उड़ रही हूँ, मुझे गिराने मत देना
 अजय, मत गिराने देना
 मुझे संभाल लेना अजय
 अजय, love you

hi.title: Alka Yagnik - Humsafar Ke Liye (Music Video) Sunny Deol, Reema Sen | Alka Yagnik | Jaal: The Trap
hi.description:
Immerse yourself in the emotional and romantic melody "Humsafar Ke Liye" from the 2003 film Jaal: The Trap. Sung by Alka Yagnik, this soulful track captures the pain and beauty of love, separation, and longing. The music by Anand Raj Anand and heartfelt lyrics make it a touching experience for every romantic heart.

Credits: 
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

snippet.title: Khesari Lal New Song | Roti Garam | Namrita Malla | Shilpi Raj | New Bhojpuri Song | Bhojpuri Gana
snippet.description:
“रोटी गरम” में खेसारी लाल यादव, नम्रिता मल्ला और शिल्पी राज का धमाका छा गइल बा, फुल मस्ती और डांस के साथ अभी देखीं 🚀

Subscribe to our channel for more Bhojpuri Songs:
https://youtube.com/c/SaregamaHumBhojpuri

Audio Credits:
Singers: Khesari Lal Yadav & Shilpi Raj
Music Director: Ajay Singh AJ
Lyrics: Abhishek Babu Yadav (ABY)
Additional Vocal - Vipul Pandey , Gangesh Raja , Ajay Singh Aj

Video Credits:
Featuring: Khesari Lal Yadav & Namrita Malla
Video Design & Directed: Sooraj Katoch
DOP: Rahul Yadav
Choreographer: Shoki & Lokesh
Video Edit: Srikanth (ZAV Studio)
AD: Geeta Tamta (Zenith)
Costumes: Reema Katoch (Zai Fashions)
Dancers: Zenith Dance Troupe
Production: Rohit Seth (Zenith)
Associate: Alex
Asst.: Prince Yadav
Focus Puller: Anish
Makeup: Aryan Rajesh
Hair: Sonu
BTS: Chetan, Pujan (ZAV Studio)
Colourist: Govindpuria

Lyrics: 

कोरस:-
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली 
 म्यूजिक ...
देखअ देखअ शर्मीली शर्मीली रंगीली नशीली कटीली छबीली आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल आ गईल 
हे हे हे ...

Chorus :-
 खुल के बतावअ गोरी कुछ ना छुपावअ गोरी 
सईया ने का का छुवा     ......आ
करअ तारु चोरा चोरी कइसे भइल जोरा जोरी
रतिया में का का हुआ .......    आ

Mukhda: - 
Male  :-
पहिला राती के बतिया बतावअ
बाटे किरिया तु कुछ ना छुपावअ -२

female -
होठवा के होठवा से देहिया के देहिया से 
रुई जैसा नरम किया 
सईया  मोरा सईया मोरा सईया 
नाही सरम किया  
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया 
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया

Male: -
निर्दईया  निर्दईया निर्दईया तोहार बावे  पिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा रोटी गरम किया ..

Female :-
खाली देखन में लागे भोला कुल्हि करम किया ..


Antra: -1
chorus: -
धक धक का धक धक का धक धक जिया करे
जब आके मौका पाके उ कोरा भरे ...

Male: -
कइसे के नैना चार भइल 
कइसे शुरु राते प्यार भइल
कांचे कसइली रहल बदनिया 
कइसे फुला के अनार भइल

Female: -
अँखिया से अँखिया लड़ल रहे 
दिल में बेचैनी बढ़ल रहे 
चुम्मा लेवे में हाय रामा ढाढी गढ़ल रहे  -२
बलमा मोरा बलमा मोरा बलमा बेशरम पिया
जला के जोबन पे ...

Antra: -2
Chorus: -
क ख ग घ पढ़लू ह का 
नाईट फलाइट पे चढ़लू ह का 

Male: -
धीरे धीरे कइसे सीन भइल 
मामला कब रंगीन भइल 
रसगुल्ला जइसन मीठ मीठ  देहिया
कइसे ए  गोरी नमकीन भइल 

Female  :-
कनवा के बाली टूट गईल
होठवा के लाली छुट गईल
फुलवा के डाली पाके भवरा लूट गईल -२
(हम अनाड़ी )
उई मा उई मा उई मा नाही मरम दिया 
जला के जोबन पे चूल्हा...

#rotigaram
#khesarilalyadav 
#namritamalla 
#shilpiraj 
#mungda 
#newbhojpurisong 
#newbhojpurigana 

Learn to sing in Sur with AI Powered Personal Music Teacher- Padhanisa by Saregama. Download Padhanisa App now; https://sarega.ma/padhanisa

Facebook: https://bit.ly/3FxwPgo 
Instagram: https://bit.ly/32rkJqM
X: https://x.com/saregamaglobal

snippet.title: Matka King - Official Trailer | Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Gulshan Grover | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Matka King Official Trailer
Starring Vijay Varma, Kritika Kamra, Sai Tamhankar, Bhupendra Jadawat, Siddharth Jadhav, Gulshan Grover, Bharat Jadhav, Girish Kulkarni, Jamie Lever, Kishor Kadam, Cyrus Sahukar, Arpita Sethiya, Sambhaji Tangade, Ishtiyak Khan, Sanjivv Jotangia, Simran Ashwini
Produced by - Siddharth Roy Kapur, Nagraj Popatrao Manjule, Gargi Kulkarni, Ashwini Sidwani, Ashish Aryan
Created and Written by - Abhay koranne & Nagraj popatrao Manjule
Created & Directed by - Nagraj popatrao Manjule

Official Release Date - April 17, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Spanning the years 1964 to 1975, Matka King is the story of Brij Bhatti, an enterprising cotton trader who teams up with a disgraced ex-soldier and an upper-class widow to start a gambling game called ‘Matka’, turning an elite hobby into a parallel economy and an alternative system for a generation that feels let down by the country as it settles into life as a free republic.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: License Ka Asla - Licence | Masoom Sharma | Amar Karnawal
snippet.description:
Presenting the second video from Masoom Sharma’s ‘Licence’! Composed and sung by Masoom Sharma, it is written by Amar Karnawal and producer by Pinna Music. 

#Licence #Masoom Sharma #LicenceKaAsla

Song name: Licence Ka Asla
Singer: Masoom Sharma
Music Composer: Masoom Sharma
Lyricist: Amar Karnawal
Music Producer: Pinna Music

Masoom Sharma & Shakuntalam Film Production ‘Licence’ - Releasing On 24th April 2026 In Cinemas.

Star Cast - Masoom Sharma, Yashpal Sharma, Sapna Chaudhary, Kd Desi Rock, Rakhi  Lohchab, Nisha Sharma, Sunil Chitkara, Gori Nagori, Abhimanyu Yadav, Manish Kumar, Akash Chawaria, Kirti Satta, Rajkumar Dhankhar, Raman Nassa, Manvi Bhardwaj, Lucky Jahrila, Satish Georgy Kashyap, Ramesh Murti, Sid Sadanand, Deven Giroh, Narpender Sangwan, Satish Nandal, Divyansh Deshwal, Rahul Pandit, Jai Bhatia, Suren Savitri Sarkar, Ravinder Bajwan Anna, Sanju Hooda, Chirag Bansal, Samsher Singh Sam, Ashok Verma, Arpit, Nikki Dahiya, Desi Patarkar Dharmu, Anu Sardana.

Produced By - Shakuntlam Film Production
Writer & Director - Ranjeet Chauhan 
Associate Director - Girish Katyal 
Chief Assistant Director - Arshveer Khatrri 
D.O.P - Vikas K Sharma
Chief Assistant Ac - Shubam Saini
2nd Ac - Rohit Raj
Focus  Puller - Mohit Z
Editor - Hittarth Sardana
Sound Designer - Neeraj Rohilla 
Bgm - Dpon Dash
Creative Director - Vikash Kaushik
D.i - Nimesh
Music - Pinna, Thinker
Lyricist - Amar Karnawal, R One,jangii, Ajmer Balambiya  
Singer - Masoom Sharma, Rekha Goswami, Narender Bhagan, Swara Verma
Choreographer - Viren Chauhan
Executive  Producer - Abhimanyu Yadav
Production Manager - Suren Savitri Sarkar
Line Producer - Ravinder Bajwan Anna
Casting Director - Samsher Singh Sam
Art Director - Vishwjeet Sharma
Assistant Art Director - Harry Ranga
Costume Designer - Rajinder Kaur
Make Up - Mahip Kaur, Tripti Panchal
Sound Recordist - Ayush Behl
Fight Master - Vijay Lamba
Bts - Ak Haryanvi 
Sub Title - Tarunpreet Singh
Motion Graphics & Publicity Design - Guri Pixe, Pawan Kaith Rahul Chauhan
Finance Manager - Vikash Rajana
Theatrical Distribution - Aanandah Pictures 
Online Promotions - Navi Baadliwal
Social Media Promotions - Un Reels

Lyrics:
Mahari ebbe sharafat dekhi sai fetange jis din bigdange , 
R mahrete k mahare saaye te bhi log ye darkai likdenge, 
Hum na hawabaaj r bande Or na chalchalan k gande r na karne faddu dhande baat sda syani rakhange 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

R jo khele khel jo loga n ve aapa khtam bnadyange, thamne to reel bnai se appa film bnadyange, 
Janta dekh k hoja bauli, barsai jb pital ki goli kheli jagi khoon ki holi pistal taani rakhange, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

Are lehrande asle dikhenge r dikhenge sareaam bhagat, 
Bdhabad goli chalengi r chalengi sareaam bhagat, 
Re wepon khas mangau mota naam yamraj ka dhardu jhota kadhle goli khoon ek lota mot ki rani rakhenge, 
Are dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 

Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange...



Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

Letra da música:
Mahari ebbe sharafat dekhi sai hai jis din bigdange, 
R mahrete k mahare saaye te bhi log ye darkai likdenge, 
Hum na hawabaaj r bande Ou na chalchalan k gande r na karne faddu dhande baat sda syani rakhange 
São dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

R jo khele khel jo loga n ve aapa khtam bnadyange, thamne to reel bnai se appa film bnadyange, 
Janta dekh k hoja bauli, barsai jb pital ki goli kheli jagi khoon ki holi pistal taani rakhange, 
São dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 
Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange... 

São lehrande asle dikhenge r dikhenge sareaam bhagat, 
Bdhabad goli desafio r desafio sareaam bhagat, 
Re wepon khas mangau mota naam yamraj ka dhardu jhota kadhle goli khoon ek lota mot ki rani rakhenge, 
São dc n mardi mohar chladya aslya ka yo jor 

Bnadya bairi ka jo mor vo bande khani rakhange, 
Konya rhva kise t darkai rakha bandukhadi n bharkai, r jo sedhya uski karkai kunba ghaani rakhange...

snippet.title: Bad Boy Karthik Trailer | Naga Shaurya | Vidhi Yadav | Samuthirakani | Harris Jayraj |  Ramesh
snippet.description:
Get ready for the action-packed ride with the Bad Boy Karthik trailer! 🔥🎬

Starring Naga Shaurya, Vidhi Yadav, and Samuthirakani, this film promises intense action, gripping drama, and powerful performances. With music by Harris Jayaraj and direction by Ramesh, the trailer sets the tone for a thrilling cinematic experience.

Packed with attitude, style, and high-energy moments, Bad Boy Karthik is all set to make a strong impact! 💥

snippet.title: Michael (2026) Final Trailer - Jaafar Jackson
snippet.description:
MICHAEL – in theaters and IMAX April 24, 2026. Starring Jaafar Jackson, Nia Long, Juliano Valdi, KeiLyn Durrel Jones, Laura Harrier, with Miles Teller, and Colman Domingo. Get tickets now: https://tickets.michael.movie/

Subscribe to the LIONSGATE YouTube Channel for the latest movie trailers, clips, and more: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.instagram.com/michaelmovie/
https://www.facebook.com/michaelmovie
https://x.com/michaelmovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelthemovie
https://www.threads.com/@michaelmovie

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL is the cinematic portrayal of the life and legacy of one of the most influential artists the world has ever known. The film tells the story of Michael Jackson’s life beyond the music, tracing his journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world. Highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career, the film gives audiences a front-row seat to Michael Jackson as never before. This is where his story begins.

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL è il ritratto cinematografico della vita e dell'eredità di uno degli artisti più influenti che il mondo abbia mai conosciuto. Il film racconta la storia di Michael Jackson al di là della musica, ripercorrendo il suo percorso dalla scoperta del suo straordinario talento come leader dei Jackson Five, fino a diventare l'artista visionario la cui ambizione creativa ha alimentato una ricerca incessante per diventare il più grande intrattenitore del mondo. Mettendo in luce sia la sua vita fuori dal palco che alcune delle performance più iconiche dei suoi primi anni da solista, il film offre al pubblico un posto in prima fila per conoscere Michael Jackson come mai prima d'ora. È qui che inizia la sua storia.

Ce film raconte la vie de Michael Jackson au-delà de la musique, retraçant son parcours depuis la découverte de son talent exceptionnel en tant que leader des Jackson Five, jusqu'à l'artiste visionnaire dont l'ambition créative l'a poussé à une quête incessante pour devenir la plus grande star du monde. Mettant en lumière sa vie privée et certaines des performances les plus emblématiques de ses débuts en solo, le film offre aux spectateurs une place de choix pour découvrir Michael Jackson comme jamais auparavant. C'est ici que son histoire commence.

id.title: Michael (2026) Final Trailer - Jaafar Jackson
id.description:
MICHAEL – di bioskop dan IMAX 24 April 2026. Dibintangi Jaafar Jackson, Nia Long, Juliano Valdi, KeiLyn Durrel Jones, Laura Harrier, dengan Miles Teller, dan Colman Domingo. Dapatkan tiket sekarang: https://tickets.michael.movie/

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL adalah penggambaran sinematik tentang kehidupan dan warisan salah satu seniman paling berpengaruh yang pernah dikenal dunia. Film ini mengisahkan kehidupan Michael Jackson di luar musik, menelusuri perjalanannya dari penemuan bakat luar biasanya sebagai vokalis utama Jackson Five, hingga menjadi seniman visioner yang ambisi kreatifnya mendorong pengejaran tanpa henti untuk menjadi penghibur terbesar di dunia. Menyoroti kehidupannya di luar panggung dan beberapa penampilan paling ikonik dari awal karier solonya, film ini memberi penonton kesempatan untuk menyaksikan Michael Jackson dari dekat seperti belum pernah terjadi sebelumnya. Di sinilah kisahnya dimulai.

hi.title: माइकल (2026) अंतिम ट्रेलर - जाफ़र जैक्सन
hi.description:
माइकल – सिनेमाघरों और आईमैक्स में 24 अप्रैल, 2026 को। इसमें जाफ़र जैक्सन, निया लॉन्ग, जूलियानो वाल्डी, केलीलिन ड्यूरेल जोन्स, लौरा हैरियर, माइल्स टेलर और कोलमैन डोमिंगो मुख्य भूमिका में हैं। टिकट अभी खरीदें: https://tickets.michael.movie/

नवीनतम मूवी ट्रेलर, क्लिप और अन्य अपडेट के लिए लायंसगेट यूट्यूब चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.instagram.com/michaelmovie/
https://www.facebook.com/michaelmovie
https://x.com/michaelmovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@michaelthemovie
https://www.threads.com/@michaelmovie

#MichaelMovie

माइकल विश्व के सबसे प्रभावशाली कलाकारों में से एक के जीवन और विरासत का सिनेमाई चित्रण है। यह फिल्म माइकल जैक्सन के संगीत से परे के जीवन की कहानी बयां करती है, जिसमें जैक्सन फाइव के प्रमुख के रूप में उनकी असाधारण प्रतिभा की खोज से लेकर एक दूरदर्शी कलाकार बनने तक की उनकी यात्रा को दर्शाया गया है, जिनकी रचनात्मक महत्वाकांक्षा ने उन्हें दुनिया का सबसे बड़ा मनोरंजनकर्ता बनने के लिए अथक प्रयास करने को प्रेरित किया। उनके मंच से इतर जीवन और उनके शुरुआती एकल करियर के कुछ सबसे यादगार प्रदर्शनों को उजागर करते हुए, यह फिल्म दर्शकों को माइकल जैक्सन को पहले कभी न देखे गए अंदाज में करीब से देखने का मौका देती है। यहीं से उनकी कहानी शुरू होती है।

#MichaelMovie

MICHAEL ist die filmische Darstellung des Lebens und Vermächtnisses eines der einflussreichsten Künstler aller Zeiten. Der Film erzählt die Geschichte von Michael Jacksons Leben abseits der Musik und zeichnet seinen Weg von der Entdeckung seines außergewöhnlichen Talents als Frontmann der Jackson Five bis hin zum visionären Künstler nach, dessen kreativer Ehrgeiz ihn unermüdlich dazu antrieb, der größte Entertainer der Welt zu werden. Der Film beleuchtet sowohl sein Leben abseits der Bühne als auch einige der legendärsten Auftritte seiner frühen Solokarriere und bietet dem Publikum einen unvergleichlichen Einblick in Michael Jacksons Leben. Hier beginnt seine Geschichte.

snippet.title: Patriot Malayalam Trailer | Mammootty | Mohanlal | Mahesh Narayanan | Anto Joseph
snippet.description:
From Anto Joseph Productions, the banner behind some of the most acclaimed and celebrated films in recent times, and visionary filmmaker Mahesh Narayanan, comes the official trailer of Patriot.
Featuring an ensemble of legends: Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Kunchacko Boban, Nayanthara, and Revathy.

Written & Directed by: Mahesh Narayanan
Produced by: Anto Joseph, K. G. Anil Kumar
Co-Produced by: C. R. Saleem, Subhash George Manuel
Music & Original Score: Sushin Shyam
Director of Photography: Manush Nandan ISC
Executive Producers: C. V. Sarathi, Rajesh Krishna
Edited by: Mahesh Narayanan, Rahul Radhakrishnan
Production Design: Shajie Naduvil, Jibin Jacob
Audiography: Vishnu Govind
Sync Sound: Vaisakh P. V.
Production Controller: Dixon Poduthas
Line Producers:
Sunil Singh, Niroop Pinto, Justin Boban, Jeswin Boban
Makeup: Ranjith Ambady
Lyrics: Anwar Ali, Vinayak Sasikumar
Action Directors:
Dhilip Subbarayan, Stunt Silva, Mafia Sasi, Riyaz - Habib, Mahesh Mathew
Costume Design: Dhanya Balakrishnan
Choreography: Shobi Paulraj
VFX:
Firefly, Eggwhite, Ident VFX Lab, Phantom FX, Binary Circus, Pictorial FX
Chief Associate Director: Linu Antony
Associate Director: Phantom Praveen
DI Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar ISC
Stills: Navin Murali
Publicity Design: Aesthetic Kunjamma
PRO: Vaisakh C. Vadakkeveedu, Jinu Anilkumar
Digital PR : Vishnu Sugathan
Trailer Cuts: Arju Benn
Music Team: Nivin Raphael, Rithu Vysakh, Moses Toby
Trailer Music Mixed and Mastered - Abin Paul

#mammootty​  #mohanlal​  #fahadhfaasil​  #kunchackoboban​  #nayanthara​  #antojoseph​  #maheshnarayanan​  #sushinshyam​ #patriot​ #mmmn​ #ajfcmmmn

snippet.title: Ginny Wedss Sunny 2 Official Trailer | Avinash Tiwary, Medha Shankr | Prasshant Jha | 24 April 2026
snippet.description:
The madness is back… and this time, it’s bigger, louder, and full-on #BawaalFamilyEntertainer

Ginny and Sunny return to a new phase of love, marriage, and family chaos. But when expectations clash, secrets unfold, and relatives get a little too involved… things spiral into a rollercoaster of emotions, laughter, and full desi drama.
Get ready for a sequel where love gets messier, families get louder, and every moment is pure entertainment.

Z Studios and Soundrya Production Present
A Soundrya Production Film
Ginny Wedss Sunny 2 In Cinemas 24th APRIL 2026

snippet.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
snippet.description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song “Runway” performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as “Lily” and “Irv” from the first film. 
 
“The Devil Wears Prada 2” is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

id.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Trailer Terakhir
id.description:
Saksikan trailer baru untuk The Devil Wears Prada 2 dengan lagu orisinal “Runway” yang dibawakan oleh Lady Gaga dan Doechii. Dapatkan tiket sekarang dan saksikan film ini hanya di bioskop mulai 1 Mei: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Hampir 20 tahun setelah penampilan ikonik mereka sebagai Miranda, Andy, Emily, dan Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, dan Stanley Tucci kembali ke jalanan kota New York yang modis dan kantor-kantor mewah Majalah Runway dalam sekuel yang sangat dinantikan dari fenomena tahun 2006 yang mendefinisikan satu generasi.

Film ini menyatukan kembali para pemeran utama asli dengan sutradara David Frankel dan penulis Aline Brosh McKenna, dan memperkenalkan deretan karakter baru termasuk Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak, dan Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms dan Tibor Feldman juga kembali memerankan peran mereka sebagai “Lily” dan “Irv” dari film pertama.

“The Devil Wears Prada 2” diproduseri oleh Wendy Finerman, dan diproduseri eksekutif oleh Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt, dan Aline Brosh McKenna. Film ini tayang perdana secara eksklusif di bioskop pada 1 Mei.

fr-FR.title: Le Diable s'habille en Prada 2 | Bande-annonce finale
fr-FR.description:
Découvrez la nouvelle bande-annonce du Diable s'habille en Prada 2, accompagnée de la chanson originale « Runway » interprétée par Lady Gaga et Doechii. Réservez vos places dès maintenant et vivez l'expérience du film exclusivement au cinéma le 1er mai : https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Près de 20 ans après avoir incarné Miranda, Andy, Emily et Nigel de façon iconique, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt et Stanley Tucci reviennent dans les rues branchées de New York et les bureaux élégants du magazine Runway dans la suite tant attendue du film culte de 2006 qui a marqué toute une génération.

Le film réunit la distribution originale, le réalisateur David Frankel et la scénariste Aline Brosh McKenna, et présente une toute nouvelle pléiade de personnages, parmi lesquels Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak et Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms et Tibor Feldman reprennent également leurs rôles de « Lily » et « Irv » du premier film.

« Le Diable s'habille en Prada 2 » est produit par Wendy Finerman, et produit par Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt et Aline Brosh McKenna. Le film sortira en salles le 1er mai.

es-US.title: El diablo viste de Prada 2 | Tráiler final
es-US.description:
Mira el nuevo tráiler de El Diablo Viste de Prada 2 con la canción original “Runway”, interpretada por Lady Gaga y Doechii. Consigue tus entradas ahora y disfruta de la película solo en cines a partir del 1 de mayo: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Casi 20 años después de su icónico papel como Miranda, Andy, Emily y Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt y Stanley Tucci regresan a las elegantes calles de Nueva York y a las sofisticadas oficinas de la revista Runway en la esperadísima secuela del fenómeno de 2006 que marcó a una generación.

La película reúne al elenco original con el director David Frankel y la guionista Aline Brosh McKenna, e introduce un nuevo elenco de personajes, incluyendo a Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak y Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms y Tibor Feldman también retoman sus papeles como Lily e Irv de la primera película.

“El diablo viste de Prada 2” está producida por Wendy Finerman y cuenta con la producción ejecutiva de Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt y Aline Brosh McKenna. La película se estrena exclusivamente en cines el 1 de mayo.

hi.title: द डेविल वियर्स प्राडा 2 | अंतिम ट्रेलर
hi.description:
लेडी गागा और डोची द्वारा गाए गए ओरिजिनल गाने "रनवे" के साथ 'द डेविल वियर्स प्राडा 2' का नया ट्रेलर देखें। अभी टिकट खरीदें और 1 मई को सिनेमाघरों में फिल्म का आनंद लें: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

मिरांडा, एंडी, एमिली और निगेल के रूप में अपनी यादगार भूमिकाओं के लगभग 20 साल बाद, मेरिल स्ट्रीप, ऐनी हैथवे, एमिली ब्लंट और स्टेनली टुची न्यूयॉर्क शहर की फैशनेबल सड़कों और रनवे मैगज़ीन के शानदार कार्यालयों में लौटते हैं, 2006 की उस सनसनीखेज फिल्म के बहुप्रतीक्षित सीक्वल में जिसने एक पीढ़ी को परिभाषित किया।

यह फिल्म मूल मुख्य कलाकारों को निर्देशक डेविड फ्रैंकल और लेखिका एलाइन ब्रॉश मैककेना के साथ फिर से एक साथ लाती है, और केनेथ ब्रानघ, सिमोन एशले, जस्टिन थेरॉक्स, लूसी लियू, पैट्रिक ब्राम्मल, कालेब हीरॉन, हेलेन जे. शेन, पॉलीन चालमेट, बी.जे. नोवाक और कॉनराड रिकामोरा सहित बिल्कुल नए किरदारों से परिचित कराती है। ट्रेसी थॉम्स और टिबोर फेल्डमैन भी पहली फिल्म से अपनी "लिली" और "इर्व" की भूमिकाओं को दोहरा रहे हैं।

"द डेविल वियर्स प्राडा 2" का निर्माण वेंडी फिनरमैन ने किया है, और माइकल बेडरमैन, करेन रोसेनफेल्ट और एलाइन ब्रॉश मैककेना इसके कार्यकारी निर्माता हैं। यह फिल्म 1 मई को सिनेमाघरों में रिलीज हो रही है।

pt-BR.title: O Diabo Veste Prada 2 | Trailer Final
pt-BR.description:
Assista ao novo trailer de O Diabo Veste Prada 2 com a música original “Runway”, interpretada por Lady Gaga e Doechii. Compre seus ingressos agora e curta o filme nos cinemas a partir de 1º de maio: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Quase 20 anos depois de suas icônicas interpretações de Miranda, Andy, Emily e Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci retornam às ruas elegantes de Nova York e aos sofisticados escritórios da revista Runway na aguardada sequência do fenômeno de 2006 que definiu uma geração.

O filme reúne o elenco principal original com o diretor David Frankel e a roteirista Aline Brosh McKenna, e apresenta um elenco totalmente novo, incluindo Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak e Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms e Tibor Feldman também reprisam seus papéis como “Lily” e “Irv” do primeiro filme.

“O Diabo Veste Prada 2” é produzido por Wendy Finerman e tem produção executiva de Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt e Aline Brosh McKenna. O filme estreia exclusivamente nos cinemas em 1º de maio.

it.title: Il diavolo veste Prada 2 | Trailer finale
it.description:
Guarda il nuovo trailer di Il diavolo veste Prada 2 con la canzone originale "Runway" interpretata da Lady Gaga e Doechii. Acquista subito i biglietti e vivi l'esperienza del film solo al cinema dal 1° maggio: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Quasi 20 anni dopo aver reso iconici i ruoli di Miranda, Andy, Emily e Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci tornano nelle strade alla moda di New York e negli eleganti uffici di Runway Magazine nell'attesissimo sequel del fenomeno del 2006 che ha definito una generazione.

Il film riunisce il cast principale originale con il regista David Frankel e la sceneggiatrice Aline Brosh McKenna e introduce una serie di nuovi personaggi, tra cui Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak e Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms e Tibor Feldman riprendono i ruoli di "Lily" e "Irv" dal primo film.

"Il diavolo veste Prada 2" è prodotto da Wendy Finerman, con Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt e Aline Brosh McKenna come produttori esecutivi. Il film uscirà in esclusiva nelle sale cinematografiche il 1° maggio.

de-DE.title: Der Teufel trägt Prada 2 | Finaler Trailer
de-DE.description:
Seht euch den neuen Trailer zu „Der Teufel trägt Prada 2“ mit dem Originalsong „Runway“ von Lady Gaga und Doechii an. Sichert euch jetzt eure Tickets und erlebt den Film ab dem 1. Mai im Kino: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Fast 20 Jahre nach ihrem legendären Auftritt als Miranda, Andy, Emily und Nigel kehren Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt und Stanley Tucci in der mit Spannung erwarteten Fortsetzung des Phänomens von 2006, das eine ganze Generation prägte, zurück auf die modischen Straßen New Yorks und in die eleganten Büros des Runway Magazine.

Der Film vereint die Originalbesetzung mit Regisseur David Frankel und Drehbuchautorin Aline Brosh McKenna und präsentiert eine komplett neue Riege an Charakteren, darunter Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak und Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms und Tibor Feldman kehren in ihren Rollen als „Lily“ und „Irv“ aus dem ersten Film zurück.

„Der Teufel trägt Prada 2“ wurde von Wendy Finerman produziert, die ausführende Produktion übernahmen Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt und Aline Brosh McKenna. Der Film startet am 1. Mai exklusiv in den Kinos.

en-US.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Train vs 100 Luxury Cars 😱🔥 Who will survive?
en-US.description:
In today's 🔴 LIVE stream, we're going to conduct an amazing experiment inside Grand Theft Auto V!

🚗💥 100 luxury cars are parked on the railway track.
🚆 And a full-speed train is coming from the front!

😱 Will these expensive cars be able to stop the train?
Or will everything be destroyed?

👉 Join the LIVE and see which car is the strongest!

🔥 Don't forget to LIKE 👍 SHARE 📲 and SUBSCRIBE ❤️

snippet.title: I Fixed the RAMAYANA Teaser | ALTERNATE CUT
snippet.description:
The official teaser for Nitesh Tiwari’s Ramayana was beautiful. But it had problems; it lacked soul. This is a humble attempt to fix that and a way to contribute to this epic journey of the Ramayana.

In this Alternate Cut, I re-imagined the teaser to prioritize the emotion and impact. This version bridges the gap between spiritual reverence and high-stakes cinematic action.

Full Disclosure: I have used AI in some scenes.

I will do a breakdown of the fix and also talk about how the idea came to me.

This is an alternate edit created for creative comparison and commentary. All rights belong to the original studios.

Director: Nitesh Tiwari

Producer: Namit Malhotra (Prime Focus Studios / Monster Mind Creations)

VFX: DNEG

Music: Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman

Cast: Ranbir Kapoor, Yash, Sai Pallavi

Which version do you prefer? The slow, soulful build of the official cut, or this high-energy "Epic Scale" version? Let me know in the comments.

Don't forget to Like and Subscribe for more re-cuts and film deep dives!

#Ramayana #RanbirKapoor #Yash #Nitesh तिवारी #HansZimmer #ARRahman #RamayanaTeaser #AlternateCut #FanEdit #DNEG #IndianCinema

snippet.title: Braj Ras (Official Video) | Hari Ras Baithak | B Praak | Jaani | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record presents "Braj Ras" 

Hari Ras Baithak is a soulful Sankirtan experience where music becomes devotion and every note carries the divine name. In an intimate baithak setting, it invites you to pause, reflect, and immerse yourself in the bliss of bhakti.


Singer - B Praak
Composition - B Praak and Traditional 
Lyrics - Jaani and Traditonal 
Music - B Praak and Mir Desai 
Video - Prateek Thakur 

Spl Thanks - Yogi and Ananda for Shyam Sundar Lyrics 

Live rhythms arranged and performed by Krishna kishor & Team

Percussionists - 
K V Prasad 
Ganesh Rao 
Samual 
Rahul 
Recorded by Lijesh Kumar (Chennai) 

Carnatic Violin - Manas Kumar 
Ethnic Strokes - Tapas Roy 
Harmonium - Shibbu ji
AC Guitars and Bass - Shomu Seal 

Instruments Recorded at MidnightOwl Studios 

Chorus - Sudhanshu Shome and Team 

Boys 
Sudhanshu Shome 
Pankaj Dixit 
Mridul Ghosh

Girls 
Bhagyashree V Mhatre
Mayuri Kudalkar 
Pallavi roy

Recorded at Input One by Samir Dharap

Mixed and Mastered by Abhishek Ghatak


Creative Director - Piyush Thakur
DOP - Nanni Gill
Editor - Mayank Thapar 
Line Producer - Neeraj Bhatt ( Bhatt Production )
1st AD - Manik Thakur
Colourist - Aman Rajowal 
VFX - Gagan Matharoo 
Local LP - Arya Chaudhary
Choreographer - Sonu Arizona
Make up artist - Gill
Art Director - Rahul and Rohit
Creatives - Siddhesh Katkar

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

► About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa’s diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: Forza Horizon 6 Official Initial Drive Trailer
snippet.description:
A new Horizon Festival is kicking off! This celebration of automotive culture and music is known to start with a bang, and this time is no exception. Drive next to a bullet train in a 2024 Nissan GT-R Nismo, take on massive jumps in a 2021 RJ Anderson #37 Polaris RZR Pro 4 Truck fitted for snow, get your first taste of the Touge roads of Japan in a 1995 Porsche 911 GT2 and drive our cover car, the 2025 GR GT Prototype for the very first time. Songs, cars, jumps - Forza Horizon 6's prologue is the perfect introduction to your experience in Horizon Japan. 

Featuring new and original music from exciting artists - hear it first in Forza Horizon 6: 
SHIMA – “Rebirth” 
Urbandawn – “Yuki Touge” 
Milk Talk – “Enchanting Stranger” 
TANTRON x Nakamura Minami – “Turbo Fire” 
_______________________  

FOLLOW FORZA  
Official Site – http://forza.net/  
Discord – https://discordapp.com/invite/forza

FOLLOW FORZA HORIZON 
Twitter –   / forzahorizon  
Instagram –   / forzahorizonofficial  
Facebook –   / forzahorizon  
TikTok –   / forzahorizon  
Whatsapp - Forza Horizon

snippet.title: Franklin & Shinchan Become MILITARY COLONEL 😱🔥 | GTA 5
snippet.description:
In this GTA 5 Malayalam story, Franklin joins the powerful Los Santos Army and rises to the rank of Military Colonel! 💪🔥 Along with Shinchan, they face dangerous enemies threatening the entire city.
⚔️ When Los Santos is under attack, only Franklin and Shinchan can save the day! Watch how they plan, fight, and defeat enemies in an intense battle full of action, emotions, and surprises! 😱🔥

🎧 Let this song take you through the journey of love, separation, and memories that never fade…

snippet.title: GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA Official Bodo Music Video 2026 | Nikita Boro | Asha Boro | Sudemsona | Lee Shaan
snippet.description:
NIKITA BORO OFFICIAL Presents

"GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA "
A Latest Bodo Music Video 2026

Produced by-- SANJ



“Gubun Raijwni Nonga” sung by Aasha Boro and Nikitaa Boro is a beautiful musical piece that blends emotion with melody. The composition by "Swmkhwr Daimari" adds a rich and captivating musical layer that perfectly complements the mood of the track, The song carries a deep cultural essence, reflecting love, longing, and heartfelt expression through its lyrics and soulful voices.
                 What truly elevates the song is the stunning choreography by " Lee Shaan Ramy" who brings the music to life through graceful and powerful dance movements. Every step reflects the essence of the song, making it not just something to listen to, but something to feel and experience.
            Overall, “Gubun Raijwni Nonga” stands as a perfect blend of melody, emotion, and visual storytelling—leaving a lasting impression on its audience

Both singers bring a unique charm to the track—Asha Boro’s soothing tone and Nikita Boro’s expressive delivery perfectly complement each other.
The music creates a calm yet powerful atmosphere, allowing listeners to connect with the feelings behind the song. “Gubun Raijwni Nonga” stands out not only for its melodious composition but also for the way it represents regional music with pride and authenticity



AUDIO CREDITS
Singer- AASHA BORO & NIKITAA BORO
Lyrics and Tune- SWMKHWR DAIMARI
Music/Mix Mastered by- AMAR BORO
Flute- ANUPAL RABHA
Serja- KULEN BASUMATARY
Recorded by- Pinku Das at Red AV Studio


VIDEO CREDITS:
Starring- NIKITAA BORO ft. SUDEMSONA RAMCHIARY & AASHA BORO 
Direction & Choreography- LEE SHAAN RAMY
Asst. - ANJU BORO
Dop/ Post Production- BILIPHANG BARO
Asst. - GOPI BORO
Mua- MIJING ISLARY
Costume- DOKHONA ( SIKHIRI BRAND )
                  WHITE BEADED BLOUSE ( SAHELI HOUSE )



DANCERS : Female
Anju Baro
Riju Baro
Firfila Swargiary
Rwisumwi Baro
Neha Basumatary
Indira Ramchiary
Nabita Baro
Sanjika Baro
Dipti Basumatary
Tina Brahma

SPECIAL THANKS TO

The music creates a calm yet powerful atmosphere, allowing listeners to connect with the feelings behind the song. “Gubun Raijwni Nonga” stands out not only for its melodious composition but also for the way it represents regional music with pride and authenticity

Song Credits:
🎵 Song Title: Nas Nas Kyu Dukhei (नस नस क्यों दूखै)
🎭 Starring: Anjali Raghav & Diler Kharkiyay
🎤 Singers: Diler Kharkiya
📝 Lyrics: Kabir Singhora
🎼 Music: JPS Music


video credit 

ritika queen 
sharad shivhare 
Shoot with editing -patel


LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

✖ Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

✖ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

🎤  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

en.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
en.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

✖ Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

✖ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

🎤  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

snippet.title: Arvind Akela Kallu New Song 2026 | नथिया उतारे ला | Shilpi Raj Ft Baby Kajal | New Bhojpuri Song
snippet.description:
Presenting Arvind Akela Kallu & Shilpi Raj New Bhojpuri Song 2026 – Nathiya Utare La / नथिया उतारे ला Official Full Bhojpuri Gana. Kallu aur Shilpi Raj ki superhit jodi ek baar phir lekar aayi hai ek high-energy Bhojpuri dance number jo audience ko turant connect karega. Baby Kajal ka performance, catchy lyrics aur Priyanshu Singh ka music is gaane ko repeat value wala viral track banata hai.

Singers: Arvind Akela Kallu & Shilpi Raj
Feat: Arvind Akela Kallu & Baby Kajal
Lyrics: Ashutosh Tiwari
Music: Priyanshu Singh
Film Title: Bargadwali Gharwali 
Producer: Ansuman Singh Film Creation Pvt Ltd 
Director: Raj Kishore Prasad (Raju)
Lead Actors: Arvind Akela Kallu Ji, Preeti Shukla, Baby Kajal, Dev Singh, Sujan Singh, Anita Rawat

Dole Da Kamariya jaise superhit ke baad, Arvind Akela Kallu ka yeh naya gaana full video ke saath aur bhi powerful ho gaya hai
Agar aapko latest Bhojpuri trending songs, desi dance vibe aur full entertainment wale gaane pasand hain, toh yeh gaana aapke playlist me zaroor add hoga.
Video ko end tak zaroor dekhein aur bataye — kya yeh gaana bhi “Dole Da Kamariya” jaisa superhit banega?

snippet.title: Nonstop Vishnu Ji Ke Bhajan |नॉनस्टॉप विष्णु जी के भजन | Vishnu Bhajan | Vishnu Bhagwan Ji Ke Bhajan
snippet.description:
Nonstop Vishnu Ji Ke Bhajan |नॉनस्टॉप विष्णु जी के भजन | Vishnu Bhajan | Vishnu Bhagwan Ji Ke Bhajan

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏

⭐#Bhajan :.
रचा है सृष्टि को जिस प्रभु ने
मेरा छोटा सा परिवार हरि 
विष्णु नारायण जी सबको तेरा सहारा 
रोज़ थोड़ा थोड़ा हरि का भजन
श्री विष्णु अमृतवाणी
सारे जहां के मालिक 
हरि नाम न ह्रदय से भूलों
हर सांस मे हो सुमिरन तेरा 
मन के मंदिर में प्रभु को बसाना 
श्री विष्णु जी की आरती
⭐Singer :  Maya Goswami & Upasana Mehta
⭐Lyrics :  Archana Agarwa & Sachin Tulsiyan &Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)

hi.title: Nonstop Vishnu Ji Ke Bhajan |नॉनस्टॉप विष्णु जी के भजन | Vishnu Bhajan | Vishnu Bhagwan Ji Ke Bhajan
hi.description:
Nonstop Vishnu Ji Ke Bhajan |नॉनस्टॉप विष्णु जी के भजन | Vishnu Bhajan | Vishnu Bhagwan Ji Ke Bhajan

तो आईए आज पावन हृदय से इस भजन द्वारा जो मांगना है मांग लीजिए।
श्याम बाबा सबकी मनोकामनांए पूर्ण करें। 🙏

⭐#Bhajan :.
रचा है सृष्टि को जिस प्रभु ने
मेरा छोटा सा परिवार हरि 
विष्णु नारायण जी सबको तेरा सहारा 
रोज़ थोड़ा थोड़ा हरि का भजन
श्री विष्णु अमृतवाणी
सारे जहां के मालिक 
हरि नाम न ह्रदय से भूलों
हर सांस मे हो सुमिरन तेरा 
मन के मंदिर में प्रभु को बसाना 
श्री विष्णु जी की आरती
⭐Singer :  Maya Goswami & Upasana Mehta
⭐Lyrics :  Archana Agarwa & Sachin Tulsiyan &Traditional
⭐Music: Binny Narang (9991980610)
⭐Video: Shalini Sharma (7015960610)
⭐Label Bhakti Sadhna (9466651081)
⭐Category: Hindi Devotional (Shyam Bhajan)
भक्ति साधना कंपनी से भजन बनवाने के लिए और भजन रिलीज़ करवाने के लिए संपर्क करे 9466651081

snippet.title: 👉 🚨 33 कोटि देवी-देवता 🙏 इस भजन को मिस मत करना 😱 1 बार सुनो और चमत्कार देखो | Powerful Bhajan 2026
snippet.description:
👉 🚨 33 कोटि देवी-देवता 🙏 इस भजन को मिस मत करना 😱 1 बार सुनो और चमत्कार देखो | Powerful Bhajan 2026

🙏 क्या आपने ऐसा भजन सुना है जिसमें 33 कोटि देवी-देवताओं की कृपा एक साथ हो?
👉 यह दिव्य भजन आपके जीवन में सकारात्मक ऊर्जा और चमत्कार ला सकता है।

🔱 इस भजन को सुनते ही नकारात्मक ऊर्जा दूर होने लगती है और जीवन में सुख, शांति और सफलता का मार्ग खुलता है।
💫 सच्चे मन से सुनने पर इसका असर खुद महसूस होता है।

🌸 सुबह या रात को इसे ध्यान से सुनें और दिव्य ऊर्जा का अनुभव करें।
🚨 इस भजन को मिस मत करना — असर जरूर होगा!

snippet.title: Franklin & Shinchan Found ABANDONED GOLD Iron Suit in GTA 5 😱 Restoring It! Telugu | Dhanu Dino
snippet.description:
Franklin & Shinchan Found ABANDONED GOLD Iron Suit in GTA 5 😱 Restoring It! Telugu | Dhanu Dino

Franklin and Shinchan discover a massive abandoned GOLD Iron Suit hidden in Los Santos! 😱
This powerful suit was left destroyed and covered in vines for years… but today, they decide to restore it back to full power!

Will the suit work again? Or is it too dangerous to activate? 👀

Watch till the end for insane transformation, restoration process, and crazy GTA 5 moments!

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

This song blends nostalgic romance with new-age sound, creating a melody that touches the heart and revives golden memories.

🎤 Vocals: Male & Female Duet
🎼 Genre: Soulful Love Melody | Romantic Recreated Version

localized.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

It’s a conversation between a couple where the guy finally opens up about his journey. He talks about the hard days, the sleepless nights, and everything he had to sacrifice to make a name for himself.
If you’re working hard for your dreams, this song is your anthem.

Kithe kithe ho jande oh gayab ve
Aay mere piche jine ban romeo

Ho jatta vale dil jaata vali matt aa

snippet.title: Rakesh Barot | Gandi Tame Badlana - 4K Video - રાકેશ બારોટ | New Gujarati Song 2026 | Jhankar Music
snippet.description:
Jhankar Music Gujarati Presents Latest love Video Song titled "Gandi Tame Badlana - ગાંડી તમે બદલાણા" Sung by Rakesh Barot, & Penned by Chandu Raval & Music Composed By Ravi Nagar, Rahul Nadiya, Starring: Rakesh Barot, Viyona Patil & Director by Chandu Raval
---------------------------
Join this channel :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCQeljbfXMX_5a2_KMXTkF-A/join

𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐑𝐞𝐞𝐥𝐬 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐦 𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐤 : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/959953769744909/

🎧 𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐨 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐬  
♪ Song : Gandi Tame Badlana
♪ Singer : Rakesh Barot
♪ Lyrics : Chandu Raval
♪ Music : Ravi Nagar, Rahul Nadiya
♪ Studio : Dhoon Digital Recording Studio - Adalaj

🎬 𝐅𝐮𝐥𝐥 𝐕𝐢𝐝𝐞𝐨 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐬
♪ Producer : MAARSS MOVIES AND MUSIC LLP (JHANKAR MUSIC)
♪ Project Lead By : Akash Digital
♪ Director : Chnadu Raval
♪ Starring : Rakesh Barot, Viyona Patil
♪ Child Actor : Vaishali Pakhane, Vihan Rajin Kumar Gandhi
♪ D.O.P. : Chirag Kachariya
♪ Editing : Ravindra S. Rathod
♪ Rakesh Barot Costume Designer : Manisha R Barot 
♪ Choreographer : Deepak Turi 
♪ Makeup-Hair : Hashmukh Limbachiya
♪ Poster Design : Pradip Karbatiya
♪ Ganre : Gujarati Love Song
♪ Music Label : Jhankar Music

#rakeshbarot #newgujaratisong #rakeshbarotnewsong #jhankarmusicgujarati 

𝐋𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐧 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐃𝐨𝐰𝐧𝐥𝐨𝐚𝐝 𝐒𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐨𝐧 : 🎶
♪ 𝐈 𝐓𝐮𝐧𝐞𝐬 : coming soon

♪ 𝐆𝐚𝐚𝐧𝐚 : https://surl.li/fwsxjm

♪ 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐢𝐜 : coming soon
-------------------------------
📝 𝐋𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐬: Gujarati👇

હો તમે બજાર માં જઈને ગોડી હાવકે બદલાણા...(૨)    
બાળા બાળપણ ના તમે બુલો હંભારણા 
હો તમે ભણતર ભણી ને ભોન ભૂલ્યા ગોડી મારી...(૨)  
ગોડી મારી બજાર માં જઈને વાલી બહુ રે બદલાણા 
હે તમે શેરો માં જઈને વાલી બહુ રે બદલાણા 

અરે ગોમડામાં રેટ ત્યારે રોજ ભેળા થતા 
બકા બકા કહીને મારી ચેડે ચેડે ફરતા 
હો ભણવા ભેળું જતા ને હામું હામું બેહ્તા 
એક બીજા નું લેસન આપણે કરી લેતા 
હો આવા લાડ કોડ ચમ ભૂલ્યા ગોડી મારી...(૨)  
બજાર માં જઈને વાલી બહુ રે બદલાણા 
હો તમે શેરો માં જઈને તમે બહુ રે બદલાણા 

હો ગોડી તમે ચમ આવું ગોડપણ  કર્યું 
બદલશો તમે અમે નોતું રે વિચાર્યું 
તારા શિવાય જીવતર માં નથી કોઈ ને ગણ્યું 
તારા નોમ નું એકજ ભણતર મેતો ભણ્યું 
હો તારા ગોડા પ્રેમી ને ભૂલી બેઠી ગોંડી મારી...(૨)  
હો બજાર માં જઈને ગોડી હાવકે બદલાણા
હો ચમ બાળા બાળપણ ના તમે ભૂલ્યા હંભારણા 
હો બજાર માં જઈને ગોડી હાવકે બદલાણા...(૩) 
---------------------------

snippet.description:
JANWAR is Out in CONQUEROR LOBBY 🔥 Bixi Op Fastest Solo vs Squad in Conqueror Rank Push  | BGMI

Welcome back! In today's video, the Janwar mode is fully activated in a hardcore Conqueror lobby. Watch me take on full squads and secure the fastest 1v4 wipes in this intense Solo vs Squad BGMI gameplay.

If you enjoy aggressive rushes, insane reflexes, and impossible clutches, make sure to hit that LIKE button and SUBSCRIBE for more top-tier BGMI action! Let me know in the comments which clutch was your favorite. 🔥

1v4 intense close Clutches Against Pro Streamers in High Tier lobby . You can see pure solo vs squad clutches and enjoy.
Another part of Bixi OP vs Youtubers / Streamers Series of BGMI.
So enjoy the video with my clutches.
I clutched against top streamers, and they thought I was hacking 😳
They even reported me live! Was it skill or something else? Watch till the end and decide for yourself 💥

snippet.title: ಗುರುವಾರ ವಿಶೇಷ ರಾಘವೇಂದ್ರ ಸ್ವಾಮಿ ಭಕ್ತಿ ಗೀತೆಗಳು | Sri Raghavendra Swamy Bhakti Songs Kannada
snippet.description:
ಗುರುವಾರ ವಿಶೇಷ ರಾಘವೇಂದ್ರ ಸ್ವಾಮಿ ಭಕ್ತಿ ಗೀತೆಗಳು | Sri Raghavendra Swamy Bhakti Songs Kannada

Guruvar Special Sri Raghavendra Swamy Bhakti Songs in Kannada bring peace, prosperity, protection, and divine blessings.
Listening to these powerful devotional songs of Mantralaya Sri Raghavendra Swamy on Thursday (Guruvara) helps remove obstacles, fulfill wishes, and strengthen faith.

These Kannada bhakti songs are ideal for Guruvar pooja, morning prayers, meditation, and daily devotion.
Listen with devotion and receive the grace of Sri Raghavendra Swamy.

snippet.title: Tu Mila Tha Jaise Roshni Mujhe | New Hindi Sad Romantic Song 2025 | Bollywood Evergreen | Sad Song
snippet.description:
Tu Mila Tha Jaise Roshni Mujhe | New Hindi Sad Romantic Song 2025 | Bollywood Evergreen | Sad Song | 90s Love Song | Bollywood Song | Romantic Sad Song

90s Love Song | bollywood song 

90s Bollywood Romantic Song | Hindi Melody

Old Bollywood Feel

90s Romantic Hindi Song

#HindiRomanticSongs #NewSong2025 #BollywoodLoveSongs #Music3Sonic #Hindisong2025 #Romanticsong2025

🧑🏻‍🎤Singer Morpankh
🎹Music Morpankh
📖Lyrics Morpankh
📸 Cameraman Kavya Dutta

90s Style Bollywood Love Song | Hindi Romance
90s bollywood romantic song
90s hindi love song
old bollywood romantic song
bollywood melody song
hindi romantic song
90s style hindi song
ishq tujhse hone laga song
jab se tu zindagi mein aayi song
dil mera tera hone laga
romantic hindi melody
bollywood love song 90s
old school bollywood romance
hindi heart touching song
romantic sad love song
bollywood evergreen love song
hindi melody 90s style
classic bollywood romantic
slow romantic hindi song
bollywood nostalgic song
indian romantic song

Tu Mila Tha Jaise Roshni Mujhe, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

snippet.title: Akh Mastani | Ranjit Bawa | Bunty Bains | Desi Crew | Ronak Joshi | New Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records presents the official video of Akh Mastani, a Punjabi party song by Ranjit Bawa & music by Desi Crew🔥

Ranjit Bawa is one of the most loved names in Punjabi music, known for his powerful voice and hit Punjabi songs like Jatt Di Akal, Yaari Chandigarh Waliye, and his consistently trending new Punjabi songs that connect with the youth and Punjabi desi audience alike.

Whether you’re into the latest Punjabi songs, searching for a new Ranjit Bawa song, or looking for a trending Punjabi hit, this song is all set to become your next favorite. From its engaging melody to its high-energy vibe, Akh Mastani is made to be played on repeat.
Turn up the volume, feel the vibe, and get ready for Akh Mastani to take over your playlist. 🎶

👉 Don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more latest Punjabi songs!

#AkhMastani #NewPunjabiSong #RanjitBawa #BuntyBains #DesiCrew #PunjabiSong #NewSong #SpeedRecords

Lyrics :
Ve baithi sajjna sheeshe moohre
Ve gutt naagni mainu ghoore
Ve tu tan sajjna rahina doore
Ve tainu udike teri hoore
Ve surma nazar utaare akh mastani di
Laindi peeng hulaare chaddi jawani di
Laindi peeng hulaare chaddi jawani di
Karke friendship aukhi howan
Ve naale hassan naale rowan
Ve daag hijr de baithi dhowan
Ve kaash main tere kole howan
Ve saar kyon nahi lainda maa deya chann makhana
Ajj kall kithe rehnda maa deya chann makhana
Ajj kall kithe rehnda maa deya chann makhana o
Haaye pagg bann ke jaddon saave kharada haaye
Hik meri te naag jiha larhda
Ve sakhiyan aakhan ehde warga
Haaye saanu vi kitte mil jaaye ghar da
Ve jachde me & u sadke main jaawan
Kinna sohna tu sadke main jaawan
Kinna sohna tu ve sadke main jaawan
Ve bains bains tera desh Punjab ae
Haye duniya vich ae laajwaab ae
Ve main raavi te tu chanab ae
Vasa tere naal eho khwaab ae
Ve tainu chhad ke kadey na jaawan
Jug jug tu jeeve teri aayi main marjaawan
Jug jug tu jeeve, aayi main marjaawan
Ve jug jug tu jeeve o

snippet.title: Ranjha (Official Lyrical Video) - Noor Chahal | IndieA Records | Rtist 91
snippet.description:
Noor Chahal's "Ranjha" is more than an ode to love — it’s a woman’s quiet rebellion. It reflects her longing to escape a world that celebrates her obedience but condemns her desires.

The song is a tender yet defiant plea to her Ranjha — to carry her into a world free of judgment and rigid norms. 

A love so passionate, it blurs the line between lover & beloved — she merges into her lover & becomes Ranjha herself. 

With quiet resilience & rebellion, Ranjha is a song about choosing love, freedom, and self — even when the world won’t allow it.

Stream "Ranjha": https://umgi.lnk.to/Ranjha_NoorChahal

Credits:

Singer, Lyricist & Composer: Noor Chahal 
Music & Mix-Master: DEVM
Label: Indiea Records (UMG) 
Video, Production & Direction: Sunny Raj (Rtist 91) 
DOP: Kaisar Alam 
Fashion Photography: Ankit Mourya (Clickwala Photography)
Post Production: Plugin films
Editor: Mukul Maggo
Choreographers: Noor Chahal, Bhomik and Divya
Assistant Director & Art: Geetanjali Raj 
Project Head: Arushi Yadav
Line Production: Jassi, Arushi, Tavleen, Aditi Verma 
1st AC : Saurabh Rawat
Additional Art Consultant: Shreya Jain
Dancers: Deepti, Aastha, Palak & Manasvi
Stylist: Prabhjot 
Artwork: Sachin
Colourist: Rajat Katth 
VFX Team- Piyush Verma, Cinevera Studios, Anurag Taneja, Baljeet Virk, Shafquat Hussain
Artist Hair: Akash Ved Birla  
Dancers HMU: Himanshi Sharma



Lyrics: 

Ranjha Ranjha Kardi Ve Main
Aape Ranjha Hoi
Iss Duniya Nu Main Na Jaana
Mera Ghar Na Koi 
Door Des Meinu Laija Ve
Mera Dil Nai Parhda Koi
Ranjha Ranjha Kardi Ve Main
Aape Ranjha Hoi…

Duniya De Rang Rang Jaavan
Te Main Changi Kehlaavan
Dil Apne Di Kar Baithan
Te Main Khasma Nu Khaavan
Dum Humdum Mera Ghutda Jaave
Til Til Mardi Jaavan
Rooh Meri Nu Seene Laa
Tenu Ik Ik Dard Sunaavan

Ve Meinu Duniya Taane Maare
Ve Main Chhad Aavan Mahal Minaare
Ve Meinu Laija Takht Hazaare 
Jithe Ishq De Hon Nazaare

Ve Aakho Heer Heer Na Koi
Ve Main Ta Jogan Ohdi Hoi
Ni Ranjha Ranjha Kardi Kardi Ve Main
Aape Ranjha Hoi…

Ranjha Ranjha Kardi Ve Main
Aape Ranjha Hoi
Iss Duniya Nu Main Na Jaana
Mera Ghar Na Koi 
Door Des Meinu Laija Ve
Mera Dil Nai Parhda Koi
Ranjha Ranjha Kardi Ve Main
Aape Ranjha Hoi…

Duniya De Rang Rang Jaavan
Te Main Changi Kehlaavan
Dil Apne Di Kar Baithan
Te Main Khasma Nu Khaavan
Dum Humdum Mera Ghutda Jaave
Til Til Mardi Jaavan
Rooh Meri Nu Seene Laa
Tenu Ik Ik Dard Sunaavan

Ve Meinu Duniya Taane Maare
Ve Main Chhad Aavan Mahal Minaare
Ve Meinu Laija Takht Hazaare 
Jithe Ishq De Hon Nazaare

Ve Aakho Heer Heer Na Koi
Ve Main Ta Jogan Ohdi Hoi
Ni Ranjha Ranjha Kardi Kardi Ve Main
Aape Ranjha Hoi…

en.title: Ranjha (Official Lyrical Video) - Noor Chahal | IndieA Records | Rtist 91
en.description:
Noor Chahal's "Ranjha" is more than an ode to love — it’s a woman’s quiet rebellion. It reflects her longing to escape a world that celebrates her obedience but condemns her desires.

The song is a tender yet defiant plea to her Ranjha — to carry her into a world free of judgment and rigid norms. 

A love so passionate, it blurs the line between lover & beloved — she merges into her lover & becomes Ranjha herself. 

With quiet resilience & rebellion, Ranjha is a song about choosing love, freedom, and self — even when the world won’t allow it.

Stream "Ranjha": https://umgi.lnk.to/Ranjha_NoorChahal
